title: Hero Homes 2 & 3 BHK Apartments
description: Hero Homes Mohali represents a unique concept of sustainable living. With over 25,000 sq ft of clubhouse space and thematic gardens, it is designed to foster a vibrant community life. The apartments are meticulously planned to offer maximum space utility.

title: Wave Estate Luxury Floors & Apartments
description: Located in the heart of Mohali, Wave Estate is a gated community offering an array of luxury apartments, independent floors, and villas. It features international standard landscaping, underground cabling, and a serene living environment.

title: Escon Primera 3 BHK Luxury Living
description: Escon Primera brings resort-style living to the Airport Road. Offering smartly designed 3 BHK apartments with dual-aspect ventilation and premium finishes. The project focuses on resort-like amenities and seamless connectivity to the international airport.

title: Joy Grand 3 & 4 BHK Luxury Apartments
description: Joy Grand redefines luxury living in Sector 88, a core GMADA sector. Offering expansive 3 and 4 BHK apartments with impeccable design, it features resort-style amenities, sprawling green landscapes, and seamless connectivity to Chandigarh and the International Airport.
highlights: {"Located in core GMADA Sector 88","Low-density premium project","Excellent connectivity"}

title: Homeland Regalia Ultra-Luxury 4 & 5 BHK
description: Homeland Regalia is the pinnacle of ultra-luxury in Mohali's Sector 77. Designed for the elite, these 4 and 5 BHK residences offer unmatched privacy, towering architecture, and panoramic views of the cityscape. Located directly on the Airport Road, it ensures instant access to Tricity's major hubs.

highlights: {"Prime Sector 66 location","Immediate Airport Road access","High appreciation potential"}

title: Emaar The Views 3 & 4 BHK Apartments
description: Part of the expansive Emaar Mohali Hills township, The Views offers premium 3 and 4 BHK apartments surrounded by lush green landscapes. Developed by the globally renowned Emaar Group, this project delivers an international lifestyle, impeccable construction quality, and a thriving community.

Situated perfectly on the Airport Road (PR-7), the project is an architectural marvel designed to cater to the highest echelons of luxury buyers.
features: {"Colonial Architecture","Private Pools in Select Units","IGBC Gold Rated"}
